name: wa_fresh_reject_snap
drl: rule W when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $v : val) over window:time(100ms); $c : sum($v) ) then end
_finding: CEP A2 windowed-accumulate (D-154/D-155): fresh admission (no RightTuple: alpha-failed at insert) checks the INSERT-SNAPSHOT ts, NOT the live ts: update {tag->x, ts:140} at clock 150 with live window (50,150] REJECTS because snapshot 0+100 <= 150. Kills any live-ts membership model.
